headline: TXN's AI Infrastructure Push Grows: Can It Boost Revenues Further?
summary: Texas Instruments' data center business jumps nearly 90% YoY on AI power demand, and its broad analog lineup is positioned for stronger momentum ahead.

headline: Navitas vs onsemi: Which Stock Wins the AI Power Infrastructure Race?
summary: onsemi looks like the clearer AI power-infrastructure buy as margins expand and data-center revenues jump, while Navitas stays small and unprofitable.

headline: Billionaire families bet on semiconductor and energy stocks in first quarter during Iran war
